title: 6.6.2 Standard INQUIRY data
description: INQUIRY 命令回傳的 standard data 結構：PERIPHERAL QUALIFIER / DEVICE TYPE、RMB、VERSION、RESPONSE DATA FORMAT、ADDITIONAL LENGTH、旗標欄位(NORMACA, HISUP, SCCS, ACC, TPGS, 3PC, PROTECT, ENCSERV, MULTIP 等)、T10 VENDOR ID、PRODUCT ID、PRODUCT REVISION LEVEL、VERSION DESCRIPTORS。做 device discovery 時每個 driver 都會解析此章定義的資料。
